summary: Iteration 131 - Server-Authoritative RPS handling verified. All code changes present and correct. Backend API working. Frontend photo-game page loads successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: - backend/server.py: 'rps_choice' WebSocket message handler at line 3145
- PVPGameRoom dataclass has RPS state fields: player1_rps_choice, player2_rps_choice, player1_rps_bid, player2_rps_bid
- _process_rps_result broadcasts BOTH player choices (player1_choice, player2_choice) to fix reveal desync
- frontend/RPSBidding.jsx: wsRef, serverRPSResult, isPlayer1 props added for PVP mode
- frontend/PVPBattleArena.jsx: rps_result and rps_choice_submitted handlers present
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 131 implemented server-authoritative RPS handling. Key changes: 1) Players submit RPS choices to server via 'rps_choice' WebSocket message, 2) Server determines winner in _process_rps_result(), 3) Server broadcasts 'rps_result' with BOTH players' choices to fix reveal desync, 4) Frontend RPSBidding component handles serverRPSResult prop. Round sequence from iteration 130 still correct: RPS→Auction→RPS→Auction→RPS.

verified_rps_implementation.broadcast_message: rps_result with player1_choice, player2_choice, winner, player1_bid, player2_bid
